Class Calculator.ComponentStyler

java.lang.Object
prog2.edu.slu.Calculator.ComponentStyler
Enclosing class:
Calculator
class Calculator.ComponentStyler extends Object
A utility class responsible for styling Swing components used in the calculator UI.

Provides consistent colors, fonts, sizes, and layout adjustments to ensure a cohesive design across the application.

    Method
    Description
    private void
    styleButton(JButton button)
    Styles a JButton with font, size, and alignment.
    private void
    styleCounter(JSpinner spinner)
    Styles a JSpinner used for selecting the number of operands.
    private void
    styleDropdown(JComboBox dropdown)
    Styles a JComboBox with font and centered text alignment.
    private void
    styleInformationPanel(JPanel panel)
    Styles the information panel that holds labels and result fields.
    private void
    styleLabel(JLabel label, int alignment, boolean isHeader)
    Styles a JLabel either as a header or as a standard label.
    private void
    styleLeftPanel(JPanel panel)
    Styles the left panel containing input controls and result fields.
    private void
    styleMainPanel(JPanel panel)
    Styles the main container panel of the calculator.
    private void
    styleOperandPanel(JPanel panel)
    Applies layout and transparency styling to the operand panel.
    private void
    styleRightPanel(JPanel panel)
    Styles the right panel that contains dynamically generated operand fields.
    private void
    styleRow(JPanel panel)
    Styles a row container used for each operand input.
    private void
    styleScrollPane(JScrollPane scrollPane)
    Styles a JScrollPane for the operand input panel.
    private void
    styleTextField(JTextField textField, boolean editable)
    Styles a JTextField with font, size, and alignment.

    • styleButton

      private void styleButton(JButton button)
      Styles a JButton with font, size, and alignment.
      Parameters:
      button - The button to style.

    • styleLabel

      private void styleLabel(JLabel label, int alignment, boolean isHeader)
      Styles a JLabel either as a header or as a standard label.
      Parameters:
      label - The label to style.
      isHeader - Whether the label is a header or not.

    • styleTextField

      private void styleTextField(JTextField textField, boolean editable)
      Styles a JTextField with font, size, and alignment.
      Parameters:
      textField - The text field to style.
      editable - Whether the field is editable or not.

    • styleDropdown

      private void styleDropdown(JComboBox dropdown)
      Styles a JComboBox with font and centered text alignment.
      Parameters:
      dropdown - The JComboBox to style.

    • styleCounter

      private void styleCounter(JSpinner spinner)
      Styles a JSpinner used for selecting the number of operands.
      Parameters:
      spinner - The JSpinner to style

    • styleScrollPane

      private void styleScrollPane(JScrollPane scrollPane)
      Styles a JScrollPane for the operand input panel.
      Parameters:
      scrollPane - The JScrollPane to style.

    • styleMainPanel

      private void styleMainPanel(JPanel panel)
      Styles the main container panel of the calculator.
      Parameters:
      panel - The main JPanel to style.

    • styleLeftPanel

      private void styleLeftPanel(JPanel panel)
      Styles the left panel containing input controls and result fields.
      Parameters:
      panel - The left JPanel to style.

    • styleInformationPanel

      private void styleInformationPanel(JPanel panel)
      Styles the information panel that holds labels and result fields.
      Parameters:
      panel - The JPanel containing input and result labels/fields.

    • styleOperandPanel

      private void styleOperandPanel(JPanel panel)
      Applies layout and transparency styling to the operand panel.
      Parameters:
      panel - the panel that holds dynamically generated input rows.

    • styleRow

      private void styleRow(JPanel panel)
      Styles a row container used for each operand input.
      Parameters:
      panel - the row panel containing label and text field.

    • styleRightPanel

      private void styleRightPanel(JPanel panel)
      Styles the right panel that contains dynamically generated operand fields.
      Parameters:
      panel - The right JPanel to style.
